intent: 3BR / 2 bath hall-core (pinwheel) with claimed carport on the right — MINIMUM ccp boundary (re-tuned 2026-07-19: the master>ALL-standards rule raised it from 13.5x14 — br3 could previously sit within 1 m² of master). 13.5x14.5 lot gives a 9.5x10.5 envelope less the 1x4 front-right carport notch; the notch overlaps br2's quadrant, so ccp needs ~0.5 m more than ncp in both dimensions. Exercises the L-cut building_void + right-side carport against the left-anchored kitchen column (kitchen_side_pin: false).
